name: junaki
description: Junaki — a self-running 6-month MAANG interview prep system (DSA, system design, behavioral, mocks) with spaced repetition and auto-generated stats SVG.

scripts.test: tsx scripts/schedule.test.ts && tsx scripts/today.test.ts && tsx scripts/mock.test.ts && tsx scripts/extract-lists.test.ts && tsx scripts/import-algofrog.test.ts && tsx scripts/assemble-curriculum.test.ts
scripts.setup: git config core.hooksPath hooks && chmod +x hooks/pre-commit && echo 'Hooks installed.'
